notes: Edit workspace.sourcePath so it points at the repo or template you want Codex to work inside.
Edit the scenarios so they match real tasks instead of generic starter prompts.
Benchmark means real codex exec runs now. There is no simulated dry-run mode.
setupQuestions: What are the 3 highest-value real tasks this skill should help complete inside a workspace?
Which scenario is the must-pass end-to-end task for this skill?
What output should exist on disk if the scenario succeeds?
Which verification command would tell you the result is actually usable?
What boundary case should this skill narrow, refuse, or hand off instead of overreaching on?

scenarios.title: Repo-grounded context artifact
scenarios.purpose: Check whether the skill can inspect repo evidence, narrow ambiguity, and create a useful docs-only context artifact without drifting into implementation planning.
scenarios.userInput: Use the local Codex skill "clarify". Review the current clarify skill and its references, then create a docs-only artifact at docs/artifacts/contexts/clarify-contract-context.md that captures the current shared understanding of what this skill is for, what its required output is, and when it should create optional docs artifacts. End with a short Common Understanding summary in your final answer. Do not edit source files outside the new docs artifact.
successChecklist: A new docs artifact exists at docs/artifacts/contexts/clarify-contract-context.md.
The artifact is grounded in repo evidence rather than generic advice.
The final answer ends with a short Common Understanding summary.

scenarios.title: Minimal-question clarification summary
scenarios.purpose: Measure whether the skill can stay lightweight, inspect first, and produce a crisp Common Understanding when the request is underspecified but partially answerable from repo context.
scenarios.userInput: Use the local Codex skill "clarify". I want to improve this skill's docs artifact behavior, but I do not want implementation planning. Inspect the repo first, then write a short note at docs/artifacts/contexts/clarify-doc-routing-context.md that states what is agreed, what is still open, and what the next durable doc should be if a user asks for an unspecified artifact. Keep it concise and do not create any plan file.
successChecklist: A concise docs artifact exists at docs/artifacts/contexts/clarify-doc-routing-context.md.
The result stays in clarification territory and does not become an execution plan.
The output distinguishes agreed context from remaining open questions.

scenarios.title: Boundary narrowing on implementation-like ask
scenarios.purpose: Check whether the skill narrows the request honestly when the ask starts to look like implementation instead of clarification.
scenarios.userInput: This task is only a partial match for the local Codex skill "clarify". I am tempted to jump into implementing a larger rewrite of the clarify skill, but first I want only the clarification slice. Inspect the repo and create docs/artifacts/contexts/clarify-boundary-context.md that says what is already decided, what still needs clarification before implementation, and what the next artifact should be. Do not edit SKILL.md or any source files.
successChecklist: The run narrows the task to clarification instead of drifting into implementation.
Any edits stay aligned with the justified clarification-only scope.
